call.transcript: Hi, I'd like to build a simple task tracker CLI tool. It should let me add tasks with a title and priority, list all tasks sorted by priority, mark tasks as done, and delete tasks. Store everything in a local JSON file. Keep it minimal — no database, no web UI. Just a clean Node.js CLI with TypeScript. The commands should be: add, list, done, delete, and clear.

call_analysis.call_summary: User wants a minimal CLI task tracker in Node.js/TypeScript with add/list/done/delete/clear commands, stored in local JSON.

custom_analysis_data.problem_statement: Need a lightweight local task management tool for terminal workflows
custom_analysis_data.goals: ["Simple CLI for task management", "Local JSON storage", "Priority-based sorting"]
custom_analysis_data.functional_requirements: ["add command with title and priority", "list command sorted by priority", "done command to mark complete", "delete command by ID", "clear command to remove all"]
custom_analysis_data.non_functional_constraints: ["Node.js + TypeScript only", "No database", "No web UI", "Single JSON file storage"]
